title: Data Flow in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger data flow in practice judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Data Flow in Practice is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Data Flow in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good data flow in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Data Flow in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
